tasks.subject: Task 0: Scaffold web/ Next.js app with nav and placeholder pages
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A building Next.js 15 App Router app in web/ with shared nav layout and five placeholder routes.

**Files:**
- Create: web/ (create-next-app), web/src/components/site-nav.tsx, web/src/app/{page,pipeline/page,listen/page,modules/page,insights/page}.tsx
- Modify: web/next.config.ts (output: 'standalone')

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- cd web && npm run build exits 0
- All five routes render a heading and the shared nav
- next.config.ts sets output: 'standalone'

**Verify:** cd web && npm run build → Compiled successfully, routes /, /pipeline, /listen, /modules, /insights

**Steps:** create-next-app (ts, tailwind, app, src-dir, npm); standalone config; SiteNav; layout; 5 placeholder pages; build; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["web/next.config.ts", "web/src/app/layout.tsx", "web/src/components/site-nav.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd web && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build exits 0", "five routes render heading + nav", "standalone output configured"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: export_frontend_data.py with pytest coverage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** One tested command that snapshots data/ into web/public/ (UI JSON + mp3 + peaks), hard-failing on missing/invalid sources, never leaving partial JSON output.

**Files:**
- Create: export_frontend_data.py (repo root)
- Test: tests/test_export_frontend_data.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- pytest tests/test_export_frontend_data.py all pass
- Real run writes web/public/data/{tracks,stages,modules,insights}.json + peaks/ + audio mp3s
- Repair lineage linked both directions (batch3-02-drone-r1 ↔ parent)
- Missing source → exit 1, no partial data/*.json
- mp3 transcode skipped when newer than WAV

**Verify:** .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_export_frontend_data.py -v → all PASS

**Steps:** TDD — write tests (fixture mini data tree, sine WAVs), fail, implement (full code in plan doc), pass, commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["export_frontend_data.py", "tests/test_export_frontend_data.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_export_frontend_data.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all tests pass", "repair lineage linked", "hard-fail without partial output", "idempotent transcode"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Typed data loaders (web/src/lib/data.ts) with vitest
tasks.description:
**Goal:** zod-validated loaders over public/data/*.json — components never touch raw JSON; bad data fails at build/test time.

**Files:**
- Create: web/src/lib/schemas.ts, web/src/lib/data.ts, web/vitest.config.ts
- Test: web/src/lib/data.test.ts
- Modify: web/package.json (zod, vitest, test script)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- cd web && npm test passes (valid track parses; unknown character/source rejected)
- Loaders read public/data via node:fs, memoized with react cache()

**Verify:** cd web && npm test → all PASS

**Steps:** install zod+vitest; schemas.ts (verdict/track/stage/module + doc schemas, schema_version literal 1); data.ts loaders; vitest config + tests; commit. Full code in plan doc.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["web/src/lib/schemas.ts", "web/src/lib/data.ts", "web/src/lib/data.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd web && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["valid fixture parses", "invalid enum values rejected", "loaders memoized server-side"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Run the real export; commit exported data
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Real web/public/data/ + web/public/audio/ committed so builds are reproducible without data/.

**Files:**
- Create (generated): web/public/data/*.json, web/public/data/peaks/*.json, web/public/audio/*.mp3
- Modify: web/.gitignore (ensure exports not ignored)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- export exits 0, ~39 tracks
- committed audio < 10 MB, data < 1.5 MB
- batch3-02-drone-r1 parent linked; exactly 6 featured tracks

**Verify:** .venv/bin/python export_frontend_data.py && jq '[.tracks[] | select(.featured)] | length' web/public/data/tracks.json → 6

**Steps:** run export; jq spot-checks; commit web/public.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["web/public/data/tracks.json"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python export_frontend_data.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["export succeeds", "size budgets met", "lineage + featured spot-checks pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Dockerfile + Railway config for web/
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Production image for the standalone Next build, ready for a modular-mind-web Railway service with root directory web/.

**Files:**
- Create: web/Dockerfile, web/.dockerignore, web/railway.json

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- docker build succeeds locally (fallback: standard standalone recipe + npm run build passes, flagged for deploy-time verification)
- Runs node server.js on :3000 as non-root

**Verify:** cd web && docker build -t mm-web:test . && docker run -d -p 13000:3000 mm-web:test && curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' localhost:13000 → 200

**Steps:** three files (full contents in plan doc); local build + curl smoke; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["web/Dockerfile", "web/.dockerignore", "web/railway.json"], "verifyCommand": "cd web && docker build -t mm-web:test .", "acceptanceCriteria": ["image builds", "serves 200 on 3000 as non-root"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Deploy skeleton to Railway
tasks.description:
**Goal:** modular-mind-web service live on a Railway domain serving the skeleton.

**Files:** none (operations task); creates web/README.md with live URL.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- New service modular-mind-web in existing project 2bc068b3-42bd-4ada-b04d-560c27a0a264
- Root directory web/ (render service untouched)
- Public domain returns 200 on / and /listen

**Verify:** curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://<domain>/listen → 200

**Steps:** railway link; railway add --service modular-mind-web; set root dir (CLI, else dashboard — surface to user); railway up; railway domain; curl checks; web/README.md; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["web/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://<domain>/listen", "acceptanceCriteria": ["service exists with root dir web", "200 on / and /listen"]}
```
